inputs.name: in
inputs.label: Entity ID or Name
inputs.description: Active entity whose stub sub-topics should be expanded.

inputs.name: context
inputs.label: Source Material (optional)
inputs.description: Extra reference text to guide the AI when deepening.

inputs.name: database
inputs.label: Database
inputs.description: Wired database name — overrides the Database property. Connect a Global Database node here.

outputs.name: out
outputs.label: Report (JSON)
outputs.description: Lists of applied and failed expansions.

outputs.name: entity_id
outputs.label: Entity ID
outputs.description: ID of the entity that was deepened.

outputs.name: failed
outputs.label: Failed
outputs.description: Number of sub-topics that could not be expanded.

outputs.name: error
outputs.label: Error
outputs.description: Error message if deepening failed entirely.

properties.label: Max Sub-topics
properties.description: Maximum number of stubs to expand in one run (1–20).
